title: pixel.identify.v1
description: SPEC A.1.1 (WA-07) — the pixel identify envelope. Registered in Apicurio as brain/pixel.identify.v1 (JSON Schema artifact under the FULL_TRANSITIVE rule, per AMD-03). WIRE MAPPING: the event rides the standard collector.event.v1 envelope with event_name='pixel.identify.v1'; the spec envelope fields map as brand_id → envelope.brand_id, anonymous_id → properties.brain_anon_id, session_id → properties.session_id, ts → envelope.occurred_at, and identifiers/source/consent_state → properties.*. This schema describes that LOGICAL identify envelope. Hashes are CLIENT-SIDE plain (unsalted) sha256 of the normalized identifier — the AMD-01 INTEROP space (joinable with connector pre_hashed_* dual-writes); email normalization = trim/lowercase/NFC, phone = E.164 including '+' (browser-minimal, Silver re-validates). properties additionally carries hashed_customer_email / hashed_customer_phone interop aliases for the live identity extractor (AMD-02 back-compat).

brand_id.description: Tenant key — brand_id-first on every event (I-S01).

anonymous_id.description: Client-side brain_anon_id (localStorage uuid — NOT a PII identifier).

identifiers.description: Client-hashed identifiers — AMD-01 INTEROP space (plain sha256 of the normalized value). At least one member present.

phone_sha256.description: sha256(E.164 including '+') — browser-minimal normalization, Silver re-validates.

source.description: How the identify was captured. explicit_api = brain.identify(); form_autodetect = the A.1.1 MutationObserver+blur detector (flag pixel.autodetect.enabled, consent-granted only); login_hook = platform login integration.

consent_state.description: A.1.2 consent verdict at capture time (per-brand consent_source: cmp_signal reads __tcfapi + window.brainConsent, no signal → denied; assume_granted → granted). Silver DROPS denied identifies into silver_consent_rejected (AMD-04 denied-VALUE gate).
